About the Doctor

Caring for Women, One Life at a Time

Dr. Sohini Chaudhury is a highly experienced and compassionate gynaecologist and obstetrician dedicated to women\'s healthcare. With expertise in high-risk pregnancies, hormonal disorders, reproductive health and gynaecological cancers, her patient-first approach ensures individualized care in a safe, supportive environment.
